title: Avoid returning null from a Boolean method
description: Callers of a Boolean method may be expecting to receive true or false in response. But Boolean objects can take null as a possible value. Boolean methods should not return null unless the code is annotated appropriately.
recommendation: Annotate the method appropriately to indicate that it may return null.
impact: Potential runtime errors due to unexpected null values.

checks.message: Annotate the method appropriately to indicate that it may return null.
